tasks.title: A4: 大扫除-删除僵尸文件+隔离非核心到archive

validation.command: cd 'O:/AII/上下文助手/' && python -c "import os; root=os.listdir('.'); required=['README.md','用户使用说明.md','core','scripts','tests','config','workflows','archive']; missing=[r for r in required if r not in root]; assert not missing, f'Missing: {missing}'; zombies=[f for f in root if f.endswith('.py') and f not in ['__init__.py']]; assert not zombies, f'Zombie .py files: {zombies}'; print('A4 VALIDATION PASS')"
cd 'O:/AII/上下文助手/' && python -c "from scripts.utils import scan_workflows; from scripts.requirement_optimizer import get_full_input; print('A5 VALIDATION PASS')"
cd 'O:/AII/上下文助手/' && test -s requirements.txt && grep -q 'anthropic' requirements.txt && grep -q 'state.db' .claude/CLAUDE.md && grep -qi 'orchestrator' README.md && echo 'A6 VALIDATION PASS'
cd 'O:/AII/上下文助手/' && python demo/demo_phase3.py 2>&1 | tail -1 | grep -q 'DEMO: ALL STAGES PASSED' && echo 'A7 VALIDATION PASS'

cd 'O:/AII/上下文助手/' && python tests/test_phase1.py 2>&1 | tail -1 | grep -q 'OK\|PASSED' && python tests/test_phase3.py 2>&1 | tail -1 | grep -q 'OK\|PASSED' && git tag -l v0.4.0 | grep -q v0.4.0 && echo 'A8 VALIDATION PASS'
